chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7622 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.38611/2015. 2. For hearing of CMA No.38612/2015. 3. For hearing of CMA No.37487/2015. 4. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Mayhar Kazi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Javed Hussain, advocate holding brief for Mrs. Masooda Siraj, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Asif Hussain, advocate files Vakalatnama of Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for the respondent which is taken on record. Counsel states that finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition and it may be just and proper for the respondents to finalize the assessment subject to the law. It is further sought that pending the aforesaid finalization, no further coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Counsel for the respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
